name: Ham & Cheese Balls]
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the finely ground ham and cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Add Worcestershire sauce, catsup, pepper, lemon juice, and salt to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into small balls using your hands or a cookie scoop.
5. Roll each ball in chopped chives.
6. Serve the ham and cheese balls on toothpicks.
7. Makes about 30 balls.
